title: Zoom in - new text shows, old text disappears, X disappears
scenario: Zooming in on a big blue dot in the Poly Studio Mobile app causes old text (headline, swipe) and X button to disappear, replaced by new description text
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on a device that is connected and has a large blue dot (e.g., a firmware update or status indicator).
Zoom in on the blue dot (e.g., pinch-to-zoom or tap to expand).
Observe the UI elements on the screen during and after zooming.
expected: The headline, swipe text, and X (close) button remain visible. No new description text appears unexpectedly.
